title: Supplementary Figures
author: Dong Hwan Ho
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Supplementary Figure 1. The representative mutants of αSyn do not alter the relative 28S/18S ratio. One microgram of each plasmid DNA was transfected for 24 h in MEF, and the rRNA levels were analyzed using qPCR. Mutants of αSyn were indicated with following abbreviations; A30P: ala-nine-30-prolin, A53T: alanine-53-threonine. One-way ANOVA with Bonferroni’s post hoc test was used for statistical analysis. Data are represented as the mean ± SEM. N=4; n.s.: not significant 

 Supplementary Figure 2. The reduction in NCL expression alters 28S and 18S rRNA synthesis ratio. Co-transfection of shNCL and NLS-αSyn led to an increase in the relative ration of 28S/18S as compared to MEF co-transfected with shGFP and NLS-αSyn. Unpaired, two-tailed t-test was used for the comparison of results obtained from western blot analysis. Data are represented as the mean ± SEM. N=4; **: p > 0.01.

 Supplementary Figure 2. The reduction in NCL expression alters 28S and 18S rRNA synthesis ratio. Co-transfection of shNCL and NLS-αSyn led to an increase in the relative ration of 28S/18S as compared to MEF co-transfected with shGFP and NLS-αSyn. Unpaired, two-tailed t-test was used for the comparison of results obtained from western blot analysis. Data are represented as the mean ± SEM. N=4; **: p > 0.01.
